# All the white-label social features your app needs
## Social essentials
The essentials to building engaging social experiences that easily integrate into your app or digital platform.
### Stories
Allow users to post immersive full screen video and image stories.
### Mentions
Allow users to tag others in posts and comments.
### Comments & Reactions
Let users react to posts or comments using text, emojis, stickers, and thumbs up.
### Hashtags
Enable users to use #hashtags in posts and comments.
### URL Enrichment
Show previews from URLs posted by users.
### Real-Time Events
Updates and edits are reflected immediately to all users on your platform.
### Explore and Suggestions
Display recommended, trending and categories of community groups to your users.
### Presence State
Show real-time user availability/status, which users can enable or disable.
## Activity feeds
Feeds are a great way for users to get relevant updates, communicate and express themselves via chronological or algorithmically ranked content.
### Global Feeds
An aggregate of both user and group feeds.
### Group Feeds
A collection of posts from members of the group or community.
### User Feeds
A collection of posts for a user's timeline.
### Custom Post Ranking
Define your post ranking algorithm based on engagement rates and time of posting.
### Feed Pagination
Whether you're querying a user, group, or global feed, a maximum of 20 posts will be returned at a time.
## Posts & comments
Increase user engagement by allowing user-generated content through multiple social media post types and the possibility to comment and discuss any content on your platform.
### Text Posts
Enable users to create text posts.
### Image Posts
Let users create single image posts or create gallery posts.
### Video Posts
Enable users to create video posts.
### Livestream Posts
Let users create livestream video posts.
### File Posts
Enable users to share files in posts.
### Poll Posts
Let users create engaging poll posts with pre-defined answers.
### Custom Posts
If text, image, video, and file type posts are not enough, you can create your own custom post with whatever data you need for rendering.
### Post Sharing
Enable users to share posts internally on the platform and externally to other platforms.
### Post Edit/Delete
Allow users to edit and delete posts.
### Threaded Comments
Enable users to reply to other comments inline/nested which encourages better discussion and responses.
### Comment Edit/Delete
Allow users to edit and delete comments.
### Push Notifications
Notify users with push notifications when there are social interactions on your platform.
### Post Impression and Reach Analytics
Gain deep insights into the reach of your social content, providing essential data.
## Communities
Build and nurture vibrant community groups where users can exchange ideas and connect.
### Public Communities
Make community groups accessible for all users, anyone can see who's in the group and what they post.
### Private Communities
Make community groups accessible only for certain users, only accepted members can see who's in the group and what they post.
### Trending Communities
Display the top trending communities to your users.
### Recommended Communities
Display a list of recommended communities to your users.
### Community Categories
Manage community categories so users can easily find the communities of their interest.
### Community Members List
Enable users to view the other members and moderators within a community.
### Join Community
Allow users to join the communities of their interest within your app.
### Create Community
Enable users to create their own community groups within your app.
### Leave Community
Allow users to leave the communities within your app.
### Official Account
Verify a community group as an authentic account. Community will receive a badge as a presence of official status.
## User profiles
Allow users to express themselves with their own profiles and interact with others.
### Profile Avatar
Display an avatar associated with this user.
### Follower Count
Display the follower count of a user.
### Post Count
Display the number of posts from a user.
### Follow/Unfollow
Users can establish new relationships by following each other, and interact with shared content.
### Edit Profile
Allow users to update information related to their profile such as display name, avatar, profile description, etc.
### User Search
Allow users to search for other users using their display name.
### User Roles
Display a list of user's roles, such as admin or moderator.
### Badges
Assign moderator (or custom) badges to distinguish various user roles.
## Security
All data going through social.plus is encrypted and safely stored. Our security program is regularly assessed by third party auditors and customers.
### TLS Encryption
Data in transit is always encrypted with the latest TLS protocol.
### AES 256 Encryption
Data at rest is always encrypted via AES-256 encryption.
### GDPR API
Our API allows you to hard delete user data and content according to GDPR standards.
## Compliance
Protect users' privacy and data by adhering to strict regulatory standards such as ISO 27001, SOC and GDPR.
### SOC2
### ISO27001
### GDPR
## Infrastructure
Scale your product and business with the availability of global regions, SSO and Webhook Events.
### AWS Multi Region Support
social.plus offers servers in the following locations: USA (North Virginia), Germany (Frankfurt), and Singapore.
### SAML / SSO
social.plus supports Single Sign-On (SSO) with Security Assertion Markup Language (SAML) integration.
Webhook Events is a great way you can extend and build custom functionalities on your own by receiving triggers from social.plus

# All the white-label messaging features your app needs
## Messaging essentials
The essential chat features to build engaging messaging experiences for users.
### Reactions
Let users react to messages using text, emojis, stickers, and thumbs up.
### Share Multimedia and Files
Handle multiple types of content — text, image, audio, video, and file messages.
### Mentions
Allow users to tag others in messages and chats.
### Read Receipts
Let users know when their messages have been read.
### Push Notifications
Notify users with push notifications when they receive messages or are mentioned in conversations.
### Chat Members List
Display list of members in a chat room.
### Unread Message Count
Display the number of unread messages to bring users back into the chat.
### Delivery Receipts
Let users know that their message has been successfully delivered.
### User Search
Allow users to search for other users using their display name.
### Subchannels
Organize chat channels with subchannels.
### Message Threading & Replies
Allow users to reply to messages as a thread.
### Image Resizing
Images are automatically resized into multiple sizing options.
### Video Resizing
Videos are automatically resized to the maximum size of 480p.
### Message Edit/Delete
Allow users to edit and delete already sent messages.
### Message History
Sent messages are stored and easily accessible for users.
### Channel Search
Search for and retrieve channels that match specific criteria.
### Channel Media Gallery
Display various types of media, such as images, videos, and documents that are shared within a channel.
### Presence State
Show real-time user availability/status, which users can enable or disable.
### Message Previews
Shows a preview of chat content, including sender information.
## Chat channels
Our instant messaging channels enable you to seamlessly implement different types of chat messaging capabilities into your applications.
### Private 1-1 Chats
One-to-one private chat channels for users to message each other.
### Private Group Chats
Private group chat channels that can only be viewed by users that are invited.
### Public Group Chats
Public group chat channels can be discovered by all users and admins.
### Live Chats
Live Chat Channels enable users to message in real-time during live events.
### Broadcast Chats
Broadcast chat channels only allow admin users to send messages, and users in the channel will be under read-only mode.
## Message types
Give users the possibility to express themselves in through different message formats to increase engagement.
### Text Messages
Allow users to send text messages.
### Image Messages
Allow users to send image messages.
### Video Messages
Enable users to send video messages.
### Audio Messages
Allow users to send audio messages.
### File Messages
Enable users to share file messages.
### Custom Messages
If text, image, audio, video, and file type messages are not enough, you can create your own custom post with whatever data you need for rendering.
## Chat moderation
Moderation is a crucial part of any chat environment to make it a safe space for users. Our tools make it super easy for moderators to track content manually & automatically.
### Moderator User Roles
Administrators have the ability to delegate roles to users, each with different moderation capabilities.
### Custom User Roles
Create new user roles with customized permissions.
### Channel Management
Moderators can Mute, Edit, Add, Close, and Remove chat channels.
### Message Management
Moderators can monitor chat messages being sent in real-time.
### Flagged Messages
Messages that have been flagged by users are presented to the moderators for further review and action.
### Pausing Data Stream
Moderators can stop the Moderation Panel from receiving new messages so that they can take action on a message.
### Profanity Filter
Automatically filter out profanity within chat channels. Specific keywords or phrases can be added to a global blocklist.
### Allow List
Websites can be whitelisted so that links from only certain website domains can be shared.
### Soft Delete Content
The content is only marked as deleted. This means that the content still exists in the database.
### Hard Delete Content
The content data, along with its reactions, comments and replies, are removed from the database.
### Moderation via API
Moderate via APIs instead of using the Moderation Panel console using social.plus Rest APIs.
## User moderation
Provide a positive and safe social experience with tools to moderate users.
### Flag Users
Flagged users are presented to the admin for further review and action. The admin can then choose to mute or ban the user.
### Mute Users in Channel
A muted user cannot send messages in a channel. However, muted users are still allowed to see the messages in a channel.
### Banning Users from Channel
Admins can ban users to permanently remove them from chat channels so they are no longer able to participate or observe messages in that channel.
### Global Ban
Admins also have the ability to impose a global ban on a user.
## Security
All data going through social.plus is encrypted and safely stored. Our security program is regularly assessed by third party auditors and customers.
### TLS Encryption
Data in transit is always encrypted with the latest TLS protocol.
### AES 256 Encryption
Data at rest is always encrypted via AES-256 encryption.
### GDPR API
Our API allows you to hard delete user data and content according to GDPR standards.
## Compliance
Protect users' privacy and data by adhering to strict regulatory standards such as ISO 27001, SOC and GDPR.
### SOC2
### ISO27001
### GDPR

Scale your product and business with the availability of global regions, SSO and Webhook Events.
### AWS Multi Region Support
social.plus offers servers in the following locations: USA (North Virginia), Germany (Frankfurt), and Singapore.
### SAML / SSO
social.plus supports Single Sign-On (SSO) with Security Assertion Markup Language (SAML) integration.

Sentiment Analysis

- Monitor overall user emotions
- Dive deeper into sentiments per topic
- Track positive and negative reactions
Content Insights
### Understand user reactions to topics
Dive deeper into sentiments with AI-powered recommendations to guide your strategies:
- See detailed post summaries
- Understand the emotional context
- Get tailored recommendations
## Unlock next level insights with GPT-powered research
Take advantage of everything AI has to offer with our GPT-powered conversational research tool to help you understand your users like never before.
Research Prompt
### Get started with a simple question
Ask a question in Research to get personalized answers based on the content your users post:
- Type a question to get started
- Or use the prompt templates
- Set custom date/time for research
Research Result and Chat
### Interactive insights at your fingertips
The research bot analyzes all your posts to generate detailed research reports:
- Get personalized community insights
- Dig deeper with follow up questions
- Download the final reports
Content Reference
### Ground your research in facts
The research bot gives you access to the original user-generated content cited in the research:
- Citation and links included in the research
- Click to easily see the original content
- History display of research questions
## Data-driven decisions made easy
Access all your live engagement data and analytics from one dashboard to stay updated on your community and make agile decisions.
## Social Analytics
### Content Data
Dive into user-generated content on your platform to create better engagement strategies. See how often users posts, their daily habits on your platform, and so much more.
### Posts
See the number of new posts created by users on your platform, and its percentage compared to last month.
### Comments
View the amount of comments by users, and its percentage compared to last month.
### Reactions
View the amount of reactions by users, and its percentage compared to last month.
### Mentions
See the amount of @mentions and its percentage compared to last month.
### User Activity Distribution
Number of posting users, commenting users, reacting users, voting users, and lurking users.
### Daily Engagements
Number of posts, comments, reactions and mentions created.
### Post Types
Analyze the most popular post types based on the number of posts created by users.
### Community Member
Overall number of users that joined and leaved the community.
### Actions Performed by New Users
Number of posts, comments, and reactions performed by users who joined in the selected month.
### Top Communities
List of the top 10 communities with the highest number of members, posts, comments, reactions, and mentions.
### Reach and Impression
Insights to the reach and impressions of content.
### Post Analytics
Track/filter posts with the most engagement, and comments.
### Analytics Data Export
Export a report showing engagement data in a selected date range.
### User Data
Easily see the growth of your community and identify the top voices leading the way. Access all the user data you need from big picture down to individual members.
### Newly Activated Users
Number of new and existing users within the selected date range.
### User Engagement
Gain insight into your user engagement with data on users who post and comment.
### Top Influencers
Instantly access users whose posts have the most engagement.
### Top Posters
An overview of users who post the most content in your communities.
### Top Commenters
An overview of users who comment the most.
### Top Reactors
An overview of users who react the most.

pages.metaTitle: Moderate User-Generated Content with social.plus
pages.metaDescription: Protect your community with advanced AI moderation.
pages.content:
### Equip moderators with the right tools
Easily monitor the environment and save valuable time with automatic and manual moderation capabilities.
### Customize & automate moderation
Automatically filter out profanity and images that contain nudity, violence, suggestive, or disturbing images.
## Protect your community with advanced AI moderation
We use AI for real-time content moderation, creating a safer and more engaging online environment. Our advanced tools detect and manage harmful content seamlessly.
### Pre-Moderation
Automatically review content before it goes live. If the AI confidence score exceeds your set threshold, the content is blocked to protect your community.
### Post-Moderation
Monitor content after it’s published. Based on confidence scores, the system can flag, hide, or remove harmful content without manual intervention.
## Content Moderation
Content moderation is a crucial part of any community to make it a safe space for users. Our tools make it super easy for moderators to track content manually & automatically.
### Channel Management
Moderators can Mute, Edit, Add, Close, and Remove channels.
### Post Management
Posts created by users are presented to the moderators for review and action.
### Comment Management
Moderators can view and moderate comments in real-time.
### Flagged Messages
Messages that have been flagged by users are presented to the moderators for further review and action.
### Flagged Comments
Flagged comments are presented to the admin for further review. The admin can then choose to delete the comments.
### Allow List
Websites can be whitelisted so that links from only specific website domains can be shared.
### Profanity Filter
Automatically filter out profanity within channels. Specific keywords or phrases can be added to a global blocklist.
### Approve Member Posts
Community Moderators can set whether members can post directly to feeds, or if posts need to be reviewed and approved first.
### Admin Only Posts
Community Moderators can choose per channel whether to limit the creation of posts to admins only.
### Pausing Data Stream
Moderators can stop the Moderation Panel from receiving new messages so that they can take action on a message.
### Broadcast Message
Administrators have the ability to broadcast messages, images and files towards all channel members.
### Photo AI Moderation
Automatically moderate images that contain nudity, violence, suggestive, and disturbing images.
### Soft Delete Content
The content is only marked as deleted. This means that the content still exists in the database.
### Hard Delete Content
The content data, along with its reactions, comments and replies, are removed from the database.
## User Moderation
Content is posted by users, so moderating people is just as important as moderating content. Our tools help your admins and moderators preserve positivity on your platform at all times.
### User Flagging
Flagged users are presented to the admin for further review and action. The admin can then choose to mute or ban the user.
### Muting Users
A muted user cannot send messages in a channel. However, muted users are still allowed to see the messages in a channel.
### Banning Users from Channel
Admins can ban users to permanently remove them from a chat or group so they are no longer able to participate or observe messages in that channel.
### Global Ban
Admins also have the ability to impose a global ban on a user.
### User-to-user Blocking
Allow users to block other users.
## Administrators & Moderators
Create positive experiences and encourage more engagement on your platform for all members of your community with our administrator & moderator capabilities and customizable user roles.
### Moderator User Roles
Administrators have the ability to delegate roles to users, each with different moderation capabilities.
### Custom User Roles
Create new user roles with customized permissions.
### Network Moderators
Network moderators can moderate all posts, comments, and users in all communities across the entire network.
### Change User Roles
Admins can promote and demote a user's role in a community.
### Community Moderators
Community moderators can moderate all posts, comments, and users in within a community.
